name: Paladin
summary: Holy warrior bound by a code of conduct. Smites evil, heals the wounded, and channels divine grace.

class_features.name: Aura of Good
class_features.summary: Possesses a strong aura of good (as cleric of class level).

class_features.name: Detect Evil
class_features.summary: At will, may concentrate to detect evil as the spell.

class_features.name: Smite Evil 1/day
class_features.summary: Once per day as a swift action, choose an evil target. Add Cha to attack and class level to damage; bypass DR; +Cha deflection AC vs target. Lasts until target is dead or paladin rests.
